# (MotK) Lily Cotton ◆

> [!tip] 👑 Hero · Threat: **5** · Leadership
> **WP** 1  ·  **ATK** 1  ·  **DEF** 1  ·  **HP** 2

*Hobbit.*

---

**Action**: Exhaust Lily Cotton to ready a different **_Hobbit_** ally and add Lily Cotton’s WP, ATK, and DEF to that ally’s WP, ATK, and DEF respectively until the end of the phase. At the end of the phase, if that ally is still in play, return it to its owner’s hand. (Limit once per phase.)
